title: OpenAI says Australian Payments Plus cut technical investigations from hours to minutes
friendlyTitle: An Australian payments company is using ChatGPT and Codex for complex work
summary: OpenAI published a case study on Australian Payments Plus using ChatGPT Enterprise and Codex across payments and identity infrastructure work. The company says surveyed users saved time, improved work quality, and used Codex to reduce one complex reconciliation investigation from about four hours to roughly 30 minutes.
friendlySummary: OpenAI says Australian Payments Plus is using ChatGPT Enterprise and Codex to handle payments knowledge, documents, and technical investigations faster.
whyItMatters: The case study is a concrete example of AI entering regulated operational workflows where accuracy, auditability, and human accountability matter. For businesses, the practical lesson is to look for narrow, high-context bottlenecks where AI can accelerate experts rather than replace review.
friendlyWhyItMatters: This shows how AI can help expert teams with hard internal work. The best use is not blind automation, but helping people find issues and make decisions faster.
